_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Total HDAC1 and GAPDH are shown as reference protein for the nuclear and cytoplasmic fraction respectively
details: Successfully used as nuclear fraction reference protein in subcellular fractionation experiments
